name: workato-qr-mcp
description: Workato-branded QR code generator. Creates QR codes with the Workato W logo, customizable foreground and background colors. Returns base64-encoded PNG via MCP tool generate_qr_code.

tools.description: Generate a Workato-branded QR code as a base64 PNG. The QR code uses EC level H (30% error correction) with the Workato W logo centered. fg_color controls both the QR module color and the logo color. Presets: workato (#108291 teal), dark, black, white, or any hex string (#rrggbb). bg_color presets: white, transparent, or any hex string. Returns: { image_base64, mime_type, width, height, url }.
